DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string — auto-filled from the Postgres service

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection string — auto-filled from the Redis service

JWT_SECRET.description: JWT signing secret — generate any long random string (e.g. 64 random characters)

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email address you will use to log in to the dashboard

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the admin dashboard account — choose a strong password

VITE_API_URL.description: Backend API URL — auto-filled, points to the backend service
